beats.label: Hook
beats.specPayload: Create a bounded run packet that records repo path, objective, timeout, branch name, and acceptance criteria before any agent can run.
beats.visualPrompt: A chaotic vertical short where a software PRD bursts into frame like cursed breaking news: Create a bounded run packet that records repo path, objective, timeout, branch name, and acceptance criteria before any agent can run.
beats.caption: Run Packet Seatbelt just entered the chat

beats.label: Stake
beats.specPayload: Local operator who right-swipes a PRD into agent work.
beats.visualPrompt: A local operator cockpit gets flooded with markdown files, neon warning stickers, and absurd meme captions.
beats.caption: User: Local operator who right-swipes a PRD into agent work.

beats.label: Payload
beats.specPayload: Right-swipe writes a run packet JSON file.
beats.visualPrompt: Fast jump cuts show the first acceptance criterion as giant karaoke subtitles over glitchy terminal chaos.
beats.caption: Right-swipe writes a run packet JSON file.

beats.label: Risk Chaos Check
beats.visualPrompt: The clip becomes a fake safety PSA about not letting vague PRDs drive agent work without receipts.
beats.caption: Risk: unlisted

beats.label: Decision
beats.specPayload: Inspect, skip, needs-spec, or create a bounded run packet.
beats.visualPrompt: End card with four exaggerated swipe choices, all pointing back to the source PRD hash.
beats.caption: Swipe like you mean it

providerPrompt:
Generate a vertical 9:16 shortform video under 60 seconds with native audio.
Tone: goofy, anti-corporate, meme culture, high-energy, but keep all spec claims accurate.
Title: Run Packet Seatbelt
Goal: Create a bounded run packet that records repo path, objective, timeout, branch name, and acceptance criteria before any agent can run.
Acceptance: Right-swipe writes a run packet JSON file. | The packet includes the source PRD hash. | The app never launches an agent from the raw gesture.
Do not invent shipped features, metrics, customer names, or implementation details.
prohibitedClaims: Do not claim the PRD has already shipped.
Do not describe files not present in the PRD.
Do not turn missing acceptance criteria into fake acceptance criteria.
